unit.note: F0 affected-surface suites all green: shared/tests 3689 (+16 skipped) + shared/scripts/tools/tests 137 + shipwright-adopt 349 — the template/action consumers + diff-cover tooling

surface_verification.justification: Change is confined to CI infrastructure: a new GitHub Actions composite action (.github/actions/diff-coverage-gate) plus two DORMANT adopt CI templates and their pytest drift-guards. No application runtime surface (web/CLI/API) is touched — no API routes, store mutations, SSE/WS, message contracts, or UI-consumed code (Backend-affects-Frontend N/A). Correctness is proven by 44 pytest contract + runtime-wiring tests (incl. faithful execution of the extracted action run: body against shadowed git/uvx) and an empirical shell-body probe; the composite action only executes inside GitHub Actions CI, not drivable from a local E2E harness.

behaviors.behavior: action.yml exposes 4 inputs with documented defaults (coverage-files required; compare-branch=origin/main; fail-under=80; diff-cover-version=10.3.0)
pinned diff-cover version threaded adjacent to diff-cover@ (no @latest slip) and all gate flags passed
inputs.*->INPUT_* env seam bound to exactly ${{ inputs.<name> }}, forward + reverse drift
injection-safe: no ${{ inputs.* }} interpolated into any run body
runtime shell wiring: origin/<branch> fetch-target derivation + space-separated coverage-files split into distinct argv + exact diff-cover argv (single/two/non-default-origin)
behaviors.evidence: test_diff_coverage_action_runtime.py::test_wiring (3 params, executes the extracted action run body) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: both vitest templates consume the gate via uses: <action> + coverage-files, keep warn-only continue-on-error, ubuntu-only, fetch-depth:0, if:pull_request, and still produce a cobertura report
no regression in CI convention / coverage-wiring / adopt-scaffold guards
behaviors.evidence: test_ci_workflow_convention.py + full shared 3689 + adopt 349 + tools 137 PASSED

behaviors.behavior: diff-cover exits non-zero when changed-line coverage < threshold (the gate DECISION)
behaviors.reason: proven against REAL diff-cover in shared/scripts/tools/tests/test_measure_diff_coverage_gate.py (same pinned 10.3.0 binary); this diff only wires argv into it (see runtime behavior above)
